title: thlaspi montanum subsp. alpinum
intro: Thlaspi montanum subsp. alpinum, also known as alpine pennycress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thlaspi montanum subsp. alpinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or as a dietary supplement to promote overall health and well-being.
